notes: QA session by Ian + Claude. WordPress + Sucuri WAF. Small IoT/sensor company. 16 code fixes, 21+ DB fixes total across all modules.

press_page_url.note: Senzary has /about/news page with real news content

article_count.note: 6 news articles on /about/news/ page, no pagination

date_count.note: Should find dates in press content

expectedCheckpoints.note: Press page with recent content — RSS feed has items from March 2026
RSS feed has content from March 2026 (within 3 months)

negativeAssertions.note: The /press/ page is a Pressure Sensor product page, NOT a press/newsroom page
Product pages about sensors are NOT press pages

fixedBugs.description: M16 matched /press/ path but it was a Pressure Sensor product page (senzary.com/press/). Word boundary matching needed.
fixedBugs.assertion: press_page_url must not point to a product page about pressure sensors

fixedBugs.description: Press page content validation was missing — any page with 'press' in the URL was accepted without checking if it actually contains press releases.
fixedBugs.assertion: press page must be validated for press release content

fixedBugs.description: Probe paths did not include /news/ which is a common newsroom path.

expectedCheckpoints.note: WordPress detected but multiple CMS-like technologies found

negativeAssertions.note: 3.7.1 is jQuery version, NOT WordPress version

fixedBugs.description: WP version detection was reading jQuery version string (3.7.1) instead of the generator meta tag (WordPress 6.9.4)
fixedBugs.assertion: CMS version must not be jQuery version

fixedBugs.description: Sucuri was not recognized as CDN
fixedBugs.assertion: Sucuri should be detected as CDN/WAF

fixedBugs.description: Framework checkpoint ordering was wrong — CMS should come first

htmlLang.note: HTML lang attribute should be present

expectedCheckpoints.note: Title exists but may be outside 30-60 char sweet spot
Meta description exists but outside optimal length range

careers_page_url.note: Small company, no careers page expected

fixedBugs.description: detectEmployerBranding ran on main page and matched product terms like 'benefits' and 'remote' which appeared in product descriptions, not HR content
fixedBugs.assertion: Employer branding detection must only run on actual careers pages

ir_page_url.note: Private company, no IR portal — /product/net-wireless-ir-blaster is an infrared product

expectedCheckpoints.note: No IR portal for private company

negativeAssertions.note: ESG product page at /solutions/esg-monitoring was falsely identified as IR portal
IR Blaster is an infrared product, not investor relations
Product pages should never be identified as IR pages

fixedBugs.description: ESG monitoring product page misidentified as IR portal because 'governance' keyword matched ESG content
fixedBugs.assertion: Product pages under /solutions/ should not be identified as IR pages

fixedBugs.description: /product/net-wireless-ir-blaster matched 'ir' keyword — infrared product misidentified as investor relations
fixedBugs.assertion: Product pages under /product/ should not be identified as IR pages

negativeAssertions.note: Calendly scheduling link was falsely identified as community forum

fixedBugs.description: Calendly demo scheduling link was misidentified as community forum
fixedBugs.assertion: Scheduling platforms (Calendly, etc.) must not be detected as community forums

fixedBugs.description: assessHelpPageQuality counted generic navigation links as help content — inflated quality scores
fixedBugs.assertion: Help page quality requires help-specific headings (h2/h3 with help/guide/how-to keywords)

fixedBugs.description: CSP with only upgrade-insecure-requests was rated excellent — should be good (lacks script-src/default-src directives)
fixedBugs.assertion: CSP checkpoint must not be excellent without meaningful resource directives
